what_it_shows: 3D MDS embedding of the inter-chromosomal contact matrix over CHM13 chromosome arms/regions; red points mark NOR/acrocentric-related entries.
quality: High-resolution 3840x2160 PNG; labels are readable enough for a single haploid reference but still need a careful caption.
notes: Use only with the caveat that this is an MDS embedding of contact frequencies, not a physical single-cell genome reconstruction.

what_it_shows: 3D MDS embedding of HG002 diploid arm/region contacts.
quality: High-resolution 3840x2160 PNG, but diploid labels overlap heavily and crowd the plot.
notes: Useful provenance for "we have HG002 too"; not slide-ready without re-rendering a reduced-label version.

what_it_shows: Original HG002 MDS contact-space visualization from the Randiak submission.

what_it_shows: Q-arm-only HG002 MDS view from the Randiak submission.
quality: Moderate-resolution 2467x1353 PNG; cleaner than all-arm HG002 but narrow and older.

what_it_shows: Per-community mean radial position and within- versus between-community radial similarity from T2T-remapped GM12878 Dip-C 3D structures.
quality: Slide-ready source PDF and converted PNG; summarizes actual single-cell 3D coordinates without a cluttered genome spaghetti plot.
notes: Best answer for "single-cell Hi-C / Dip-C 3D plot"; report values: W/B 0.931, Fisher p=2.4e-05, Mantel rho 0.296.

what_it_shows: Per-community radial position and within- versus between-community radial similarity across 20 haploid sperm cells.
quality: Slide-ready source PDF and converted PNG; strong signal and compact story.
notes: Good companion to GM12878 if the slide needs the distinct sperm architecture point; report values: W/B 0.401, Fisher p=3.9e-51, Mantel rho 0.202.

what_it_shows: Mantel scatter comparing sequence similarity with 3D proximity across arm pairs.
quality: Good source PDF, but it is a statistical scatter rather than a visual 3D plot.
notes: Already staged in v6; use only if replacing a quantitative validation panel.

what_it_shows: Mantel scatter comparing sequence similarity with 3D proximity in sperm 3DG structures.
